title: Amphenol Honors Mouser Electronics with Fourth High Service Digital Performance Award
text: MANSFIELD, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Mouser Electronics, Inc., the authorized global distributor with the newest semiconductors and electronic components, is pleased to announce that it has been honored with the 2022 Best High Service Digital Performance Award from its valued partner Amphenol Corporation, a global leader in the interconnect industry. With almost 600,000 Amphenol parts available to order, Mouser offers an ever-widening selection of the manufacturer's newest products, available on.
